name: Survival Horror Starter
description: Top-down survival horror with limited visibility via flashlight mechanics, inventory system, locked doors with key items, enemy AI with patrol/chase states, sound-based detection, and resource scarcity.

projectStructure.project.godot: Godot 4.x with physics set to 2D, CanvasModulate layer for darkness (dark gray), default scene: res://scenes/level.tscn, input_map: ui_flashlight (F), ui_inventory (I), ui_interact (E)

scenes/.player.tscn: CharacterBody2D with: Sprite2D (top-down player, 32x32), CollisionShape2D (circle), flashlight child (Light2D), max_health (100), current_health, move_speed (150), inventory_ref (reference to inventory.tscn), flashlight_enabled flag, noise_emitter (Area2D with radius 100 for sound detection by enemies)
scenes/.flashlight.tscn: Light2D (PointLight2D or spot with angle=45deg, range=200, color=yellow) child of player.tscn, battery_level (0-100%), drain_rate (5% per 10 seconds), sprite for flashlight cone (optional), enabled via ui_flashlight toggle
scenes/.enemy_stalker.tscn: CharacterBody2D with: Sprite2D (top-down enemy, 40x40, dark gray), CollisionShape2D, max_health (30), current_health, move_speed (80-120 depending on state), vision_range (Area2D, 150px radius), hearing_range (Area2D, 200px radius), state_machine (patrol/alert/chase/search), NavigationAgent2D for pathfinding
scenes/.environment/room.tscn: Node2D with: TileMap (walls, obstacles), TileMap (shadow layer with CanvasModulate darkness effect), lighting fixtures (Light2D nodes at room_corners for ambient), furniture/props (StaticBody2D obstacles)
scenes/.items/key_item.tscn: Area2D with Sprite2D (small key, 16x16), item_type ('key_red' or 'key_blue'), on_area_entered signal triggers pickup, connected to inventory.gd
scenes/.items/health_item.tscn: Area2D with Sprite2D (medical kit, 24x24), item_type ('health_pack'), heal_amount (50), on_pickup heals player
scenes/.items/ammo.tscn: Area2D with Sprite2D (ammo box, 16x16), item_type ('ammo'), ammo_count (15), on_pickup adds to inventory
scenes/.door_locked.tscn: StaticBody2D with: Sprite2D (closed door, 64x32), CollisionShape2D (blocks passage), requires_key_type ('key_red'), unlock_sound (AudioStreamPlayer2D), on_player_interaction if inventory has key_type, disable collision, change sprite to open_door, emit door_unlocked
scenes/.ui/inventory.tscn: CanvasLayer with: GridContainer (6 slots, 2x3), ItemSlot instances (Control scenes for each slot with Sprite2D for item icon, Label for count), selected_slot indicator (highlight rect), description_label (below grid shows item name/description)
scenes/.ui/health_display.tscn: CanvasLayer with: Label (Health: 100/100), TextureProgressBar (health bar, red gradient), position: top-left
scenes/.ui/pause_menu.tscn: CanvasLayer with: ColorRect (semi-transparent black), Label (Paused), Button (Resume), Button (Save Game), Button (Quit)

scripts/.player.gd: CharacterBody2D script: velocity property, move_speed (150), max_health, current_health, inventory (reference), flashlight_enabled flag. _process polls WASD for movement, applies to velocity, move_and_collide(). on_input(event) ui_flashlight toggles flashlight_enabled, ui_interact broadcasts interaction signal, ui_inventory toggles inventory UI visibility. on_damage(damage) reduces current_health, apply knockback. Noise emitter detects enemies within hearing_range; add to alert_list. Signals: on_health_changed, on_interact, on_death.
scripts/.flashlight.gd: Light2D script: battery_level (0-100), drain_rate (5 per 10s). _process decrements battery_level on flashlight_enabled, disables light at 0%. on_battery_item_pickup resets battery to 100. energy_level visual feedback: full (1.0) > medium (0.7) > low (0.4) > dead (0.0). Optional: Light2D flickers at low battery.
scripts/.enemy_ai.gd: CharacterBody2D script: state_machine managing patrol, alert, chase, search states. patrol_state: follow patrol_points array in sequence using NavigationAgent2D, move_speed (80). alert_state: triggered on player detected in vision_range or hearing_range, play alert_sound, transition to chase if visible. chase_state: pursue player using target_player position, move_speed increases to 120, emit hunt_sound every 3s. search_state: player left line of sight, patrol patrol_points while searching, transition to patrol if 15s without detection. Signals: on_player_detected, on_player_lost. on_collision vs player, apply damage (10 hp). on_death emit death_signal.
scripts/.inventory.gd: Node script: inventory_slots (6 max), inventory_array [{item_type, count}]. Methods: add_item(item_type, count) adds to matching slot or new slot if full return error. remove_item(slot_index, count) removes from slot. get_item(slot_index) returns item data. on_item_used(slot_index) triggers item effect (heal_pack heals player, key item unlocks door). UI updates on inventory change (emit inventory_updated signal). Save inventory state on game save.
scripts/.door_system.gd: StaticBody2D script: requires_key_type, locked flag, on_player_interact(distance_check < 50px) checks inventory.has_item(requires_key_type), if true unlock (disable collision, change sprite, emit unlocked signal), else display 'locked' message. on_unlock optional: consume key from inventory (remove_item), or unlimited uses depending on design.
scripts/.enemy_ai.gd: StaticBody2D script with state machine: patrol_state moves between patrol_points, alert_state triggered by vision_range.has_overlapping_bodies() (player in range), chase_state pursues NavigationAgent2D.set_target_position(player.position), search_state if player escapes (line of sight broken for 15s). Emit sounds on state change for audio cues to player. on_area_entered(body, by vision_range) if body == player, emit player_detected. on_physics_process move_and_collide towards target.
scripts/.audio_manager.gd: Node script: bgm_player (AudioStreamPlayer, ambient horror track looping), sfx dict {footstep, heartbeat, enemy_growl, door_unlock, item_pickup, player_damage, flashlight_click, battery_depleted}, play_sfx(key, position 3D for spatial audio), play_bgm(stream). Heartbeat SFX increases BPM when enemy near (based on distance).

assets/.sprites/: player_topdown.png (32x32 human), enemy_stalker.png (40x40 dark creature), key_red.png (16x16), key_blue.png (16x16), health_pack.png (24x24 medical cross), ammo_box.png (16x16), door_closed.png (64x32), door_open.png (64x32), flashlight_cone.png (cone shape overlay), wall_tiles.png (tileset), furniture_table.png, furniture_shelf.png

audio/.bgm_horror.ogg: Ambient horror music, minor key, sparse notes, 60-80 BPM
audio/.sfx_heartbeat.ogg: Looping heartbeat, BPM scales with danger

assets/.shaders/: darkness.gdshader (CanvasModulate shader darkens scene except flashlight area)

preBuiltMechanics: CharacterBody2D player with WASD movement, limited to walk speed (150 px/s), no running
Light2D flashlight with battery system (drains over time, recharges with pickups)
CanvasModulate darkness effect creating fog-of-war outside light range
Inventory system: 6-slot grid, stores keys, health items, ammo with UI display
Key-based door locks: StaticBody2D doors require specific key item type to unlock
Enemy AI state machine: patrol (waypoints), alert (on detection), chase (pursue player), search (if line-of-sight broken)
Vision-based detection: Area2D vision_range (150px) detects player if within cone
Sound-based detection: Area2D hearing_range (200px) triggered by player noise emissions
Health system with damage on enemy collision, heal items for recovery
Resource scarcity: limited ammo, limited health items, battery management
Spatial audio: footsteps, enemy sounds localized to world positions
customizationPoints: Create new enemy types: duplicate enemy_stalker.tscn, modify patrol behavior, vision_range, move_speed, attack damage. Example: fast zombie (100 speed, 100px vision), tank (60 speed, 150 damage)
Add new room variants: different TileMap layouts, varied enemy spawn positions, obstacle placement
Implement advanced AI: memory system (remember last seen position), group hunting (enemies communicate proximity), learning (avoid areas player frequently visits)
Create additional lock types: key cards (require specific card), combination locks (UI puzzle), biometric locks (sound-based or item-based requirements)
Add health system variants: bleeding status (health slowly depletes), poisoned (health reductions every 5s), infection timer until death
Implement equipment system: guns with ammo (consume ammo on attack), armor (reduces damage), consumables with cooldowns
Create sound propagation system: calculate sound distance from player movements, alert enemies within hearing_range_multiplier of noise
Add psychological horror elements: sanity mechanic (see hallucinations at low sanity), fear audio cues, visual distortions in darkness
examplePrompts: Create a survival horror level with 3 interconnected rooms, 2 locked doors (red key, blue key), and 2 enemy stalkers patrolling different areas.
Implement a flashlight system with 100% battery that drains 5% per 10 seconds; find battery pickups to recharge.
Design enemy AI that patrols waypoints normally, enters alert state when player enters 150px vision range, then chases if player visible.
Build an inventory system with 6 slots; add items on pickup (keys, health packs, ammo); equip items for use (keys unlock doors, health packs heal 50 HP).
Create locked doors that require specific key types; door sprites change from closed to open on unlock and remain passable.
Implement sound-based enemy detection: emit noise on footsteps; enemies within 200px hearing_range enter alert state.
Add a heartbeat audio cue that increases BPM as enemies approach; reaches max BPM when enemy is within 100px.
Design a dark atmosphere: CanvasModulate darkens entire scene except within flashlight cone; room ambient lighting adds subtle illumination.
